goal: Fix waitlist signup by updating Resend sender email and aligning Supabase schema.

steps.action: Update verified email sender in lib/resend.ts from hello@greenlitmd.app to hello@contact.greenlitmd.app.
steps.success_criteria: The file contains hello@contact.greenlitmd.app as the sender address.
steps.notes: Must match the verified Resend domain from AGENTS.md.

steps.action: Update supabase_setup.sql schema definition to include name and unsubscribed columns.
steps.success_criteria: The file supabase_setup.sql contains definition for name text and unsubscribed boolean DEFAULT false.
steps.notes: User confirmation is required for SQL changes as per AGENTS.md rules.

steps.action: Inform the user to unpause their Supabase database at https://zvarxrjfjxghclarvoux.supabase.co and run the SQL migration for waitlist_signups.
steps.success_criteria: User unpauses the database and runs the SQL commands to add name and unsubscribed columns.
steps.notes: External dependency on user database restoration.

constraints: Do not modify Supabase database schema on the live database directly without human confirmation.
Do not hardcode keys or secrets.
Use server-side Supabase client actions only.
rollback: Revert changes in lib/resend.ts and supabase_setup.sql using git checkout.
